author: Yash Kumar
name: 11L PartialRoPE XSA4 EMA GPTQ-lite LeakyReLU (1xH100)
blurb: Non-record 1xH100 screening submission: March 22 11L GPTQ-lite/EMA/XSA4/PartialRoPE stack with a single March 23 activation port to LeakyReLU(0.5)^2. Fair 4-shard 600s comparison run under the 16MB cap; conservative post-quant roundtrip score 1.30806928 BPB.
